since_last: 43% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.05%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.29% · BTC -4.68% · Gold -2.49% · Nasdaq100 -0.11%. 43% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.05%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.05%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -5.52%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +5.18%, INTU +4.44%, ZBRA +3.78%, PATH +3.59%, WDAY +3.56%. Laggards: SMR -5.52%, OKLO -5.28%, OKLO -5.28%, INOD -5.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.01% at $156.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
